overview.description: The Simplify Multi-QIS Alternative ETF (QIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund aims to provide positive absolute returns and income using quantitative investment strategies to invest across equities, interest rates, commodities, and currencies through total return swaps. QIS was launched on Jul 10, 2023 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Multi-QIS Alternative ETF (QIS)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management Inc. is restating the NAV for the Simplify Multi-QIS Alternative ETF (NYSE Arca: QIS).

data.title: Simplify Launches First-of-its-Kind Multi-Quantitative Strategy ETF (QIS)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches QIS ETF with diversified portfolio of quantitative strategies, provides access to investment category used by biggest institutions.
